commit.message:
feat(gitinfo): separate local/remote branches by panel mode (#46) (#47)

* feat(gitinfo): separate local/remote branches by panel mode (#46)

Filter branches in buildItems() based on panel mode:
- ModeGit (gitinfo panel): shows only local branches
- ModeGitHub (github panel): shows only remote branches
- ModeAll: shows both (backwards compatible)

Tab counts, cursor positioning, and all operations (checkout,
delete, rename) work correctly on the filtered lists.

Closes #46

* fix: use tagged switch to satisfy staticcheck QF1003

commit.message:
feat(dht): add mDNS fallback discovery for containerized environments

- Implement MDNSDiscovery for local peer discovery via mDNS protocol
- Integrate mDNS as fallback when UDP broadcast fails
- Add LANDiscovery.handleBroadcastFailure() to track consecutive failures
- Enable mDNS automatically after 3 consecutive broadcast failures
- Register callbacks with mDNS when peers are discovered
- Update AUDIT.md with mDNS discovery implementation status
- Add comprehensive test coverage for mDNS discovery operations

Improves peer discovery reliability in Docker bridge networks, Kubernetes
pods, and other containerized environments where UDP broadcast doesn't work
reliably.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(dht): add network partition detection

Add PartitionDetector to detect and handle network partitions in the DHT:

- Detects partition state (Healthy, Warning, Partitioned, Recovering)
- Triggers automatic re-bootstrap on partition detection
- Includes comprehensive test suite with state transitions

commit.message:
Fix PSD import: correct opacity range and bake layer masks into alpha (#35)

* Add PSD import/export support using ag-psd library

- Create psd-io.js module with exportPSD() and importPSD() functions
- Lazy-load ag-psd from esm.sh CDN on first use
- Export preserves layer names, opacity, blend modes, visibility
- Import handles nested group layers (flattened to individual layers)
- Map all 16 CSS blend modes to PSD equivalents
- Add Export PSD and Import PSD buttons to topbar

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/5c80e6a2-0de4-40e3-9a66-393d26d4d573

* Fix PSD import/export: broaden accept filter and fix download

Import: add PSD MIME types (image/vnd.adobe.photoshop, application/x-photoshop,
application/photoshop) alongside .psd extension so files aren't greyed out.

Export: use proper PSD MIME type on blob, append anchor to DOM before
clicking for reliable download with correct .psd filename.

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/5e286745-a1ea-4392-8741-c0bf2ef49c96

* Fix PSD import: correct initializeCanvas API, DOM-attach input, composite fallback

- Fix initializeCanvas to match ag-psd v30 API (removed createCanvasFromData param)
- Attach file input to DOM before clicking for reliable change event
- Add fallback: import composite image when PSD has no separate layer children

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/b0881454-e84b-4af0-96bf-80b153537606

* Guard input removal with parentNode check

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/b0881454-e84b-4af0-96bf-80b153537606

* Fix PSD import: handle esm.sh default-export wrapping, use Uint8Array, show error details

- Resolve ag-psd exports whether named or wrapped under .default by esm.sh
- Only cache _agPsd after successful initializeCanvas (prevents broken state on retry)
- Pass new Uint8Array(arrayBuffer) to readPsd for maximum compatibility
- Show actual error message in toast so users can diagnose failures

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/921058c6-9fc6-426e-be4c-d701b9ef0441

* Fix PSD opacity: ag-psd uses 0-1 range, not 0-255

Import was dividing child.opacity by 255, making all layers ~0% opacity.
Export was multiplying by 255, creating invalid values.
Both now use ag-psd's native 0-1 range with clamping validation.

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/40219979-00e6-48da-87e3-bd5f16cd56b7

* Bake PSD layer masks into alpha during import

When importing PSD files with layer masks, multiply each layer's
alpha channel by the mask luminance. Handles mask position/offset,
defaultColor (0=hidden vs 255=visible outside bounds), and disabled
masks. Since the app has no native mask support, masks are burned
into the layer pixels so the result matches Photoshop.

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/e963f45b-eec6-47d1-8ace-ae09c856f55f

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: replace synthesized audio with pre-rendered WAV files (#224)

* feat: replace synthesized audio with pre-rendered WAV files

Moves sound generation out of the browser. Each sound is now a
static WAV asset built once by dump-sounds.mjs and loaded at
startup via fetch + decodeAudioData.

- Removes renderTone / renderPop / renderTick synthesis functions
- Adds beep.wav, ding.wav, pop.wav, tick.wav to src/audio/
- playBuffer now accepts Promise<AudioBuffer> and resolves before
  playing; public API (playBeep, playDing, playPop, playTick) is
  unchanged

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Increase spin-wait threshold from 2ms to 4ms

* Add action timing debug logs and performance marks

- Thread postedAt timestamp through worker action messages to measure
  IPC latency on the main thread
- Log worker post time, receive time, audio initiation, and completion
  with durations for each action
- Add performance.mark() + performance.measure() around each sound
  playback so beeps appear as labeled duration bars in the DevTools
  Performance panel Timings row
- Increase SPINWAIT_MS from 2ms to 4ms to reliably beat setTimeout's
  ~4ms minimum resolution floor

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(async): add AsyncStorageEnabled option for optional storage node participation

- Add AsyncStorageEnabled field to Options struct (default: true)
- Conditionally initialize async manager based on configuration
- Update documentation to reflect storage node opt-out capability
- Create comprehensive implementation plan for network resilience features

This feature allows users to disable storage node participation while
retaining async messaging send capability. Opt-out is via:
  options.AsyncStorageEnabled = false

The accompanying PLAN.md document outlines 11 implementation steps to
address network topology resilience (Priority 11) and scalability
patterns (Priority 12) from the ROADMAP, including gossip-based
bootstrap, mDNS discovery, partition detection, sender-key encryption,
and pre-key DHT bundles.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Pin dependencies to exact versions and enhance bunfig security (#270)

This pull request makes improvements to package management configuration
to ensure more reliable and secure dependency handling. The main changes
include enforcing exact dependency versions, setting a minimum release
age for installed packages, and updating some development dependencies
to use exact versions.

Dependency management improvements:

* Added an `[install]` section to `bunfig.toml` to enforce exact
dependency versions (`exact = true`) and require packages to be at least
three days old before installation, reducing the risk of freshly
published malicious packages.
* Changed all dependency and devDependency version specifiers in
`package.json` from using caret (`^`) ranges to exact versions, ensuring
consistent installs across environments.
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-7ae45ad102eab3b6d7e7896acd08c427a9b25b346470d7bc6507b6481575d519L18-R18)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-7ae45ad102eab3b6d7e7896acd08c427a9b25b346470d7bc6507b6481575d519L28-R31)

Dependency updates:

* Updated the version of `@happy-dom/global-registrator` in
`package.json` from `^20.5.0` to `20.8.4` to use the latest exact
version.

---------

Co-authored-by: Pablo Zaidenvoren <pablozaiden@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

ci: fix release pipeline — merge version-bump into release workflow (#1)

* ci: merge version-bump into release workflow

Fix critical bug: version-bump.yml created tags using GITHUB_TOKEN,
but events from GITHUB_TOKEN don't trigger other workflows, so
release.yml would never fire.

Now a single release workflow handles everything on push to master:
1. Determine version bump type (conventional commits)
2. Compute next semver version
3. Build, sign, and publish to Maven Central + GitHub Packages
4. Commit version bump + create tag
5. Create GitHub Release

CI workflow now only runs on PRs (validation before merge).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* ci: remove version-bump.yml (merged into release.yml)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: dedicated worker pods, in-app notifications, report alerts

Architecture:
- Worker WORKER_QUEUES env var selects which BullMQ queues to process
- Same Docker image, different config per pod — no new images needed
- Default split: sync-worker (sync,analytics,webhooks),
  notification-worker (notifications), report-worker (reports)

In-app notifications:
- New in_app_notifications DB table with unread tracking
- Notification processor creates in-app row for every notification
- GET /v1/users/:id/notifications/inbox (list + unread count)
- PATCH /v1/users/:id/notifications/inbox/read (mark read)
- Dashboard notification bell with unread badge + dropdown panel

Report completion alerts:
- Report worker enqueues notification when report status → ready
- User sees 'Weekly Report Ready' in bell + Discord/Slack/etc.

Infrastructure:
- Helm: new notificationWorker + reportWorker deployments
- docker-compose: dedicated notification-worker + report-worker services
- Existing worker deployment sets WORKER_QUEUES via values

Documentation:
- README: updated architecture diagram, worker section, notification docs
- Helm values: documented new worker sections

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Windows-only cleanup and native NPZ loading

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Migrate game logs and high scores from localStorage to Convex backend

Replace localStorage/AsyncStorage persistence with shared Convex database
so game logs and high scores are shared across web, desktop, and mobile.

Changes:
- convex/schema.ts: New gameLogs + highScores tables (replaced 4 unused tables)
- convex/gameLogs.ts: add mutation (with server-side gameId dedup), list query
- convex/highScores.ts: submit mutation (with top-10 pruning), top query
- Deleted unused convex/games.ts and convex/leaderboard.ts
- All 3 apps wrapped with ConvexProvider
- All 3 App components use useQuery/useMutation instead of local storage
- Vite configs updated with envDir pointing to monorepo root
- Added convex dependency to desktop and mobile packages
- Theme preference remains in localStorage/AsyncStorage (per-device)

Requires: Run 'bun x convex dev' to deploy backend and generate types.
See .env.local.example for required environment variables.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Select python3 in armv7hf target config

- enable python3 and libpython3 in the armv7hf target config so the bake script triggers the explicit Python package build path
- make CI verification search all built ipks under bin instead of assuming a single package directory
- unblock the final package-set verification step before feed staging and Pages deploy

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Rewrite install-first README

Rework the Japanese and English README files for non-engineer users, focusing on release zip installation, first use in OBS, and simple troubleshooting.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Ship DLL-only release packaging

Remove legacy Python and external locale files from release/install paths, keep the plugin self-contained through embedded fallback text, and bump the project version for the v0.1.28 release.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Default strict sync to auto follow

Make OBS follow mode the default with explicit direct-input opt-out, normalize the displayed source name to MotionPngTuberPlayer, and keep runtime auto-resolution on the source/update side so OBS requests do not hang.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: show provider name in sync jobs UI and failure notifications

- Sync jobs table: added 'Provider' column showing providerId (e.g. withings, fitbit)
- Failed jobs alert banner: prefixes each error with [provider]
- Mobile card view: shows provider name next to status badge
- Search: now includes providerId in text search
- CSV export: includes provider column
- Worker: failure notifications now say 'Withings Sync Failed' instead of generic 'Sync Failed'
- Frontend SyncJob type: added providerId to data interface

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Merge pull request #12 from dchu3/feat/configure-paste-ux

fix: handle clear sentinel and empty RHS in key-value paste

- Check 'clear' sentinel on raw input before prefix-stripping so
  pasting KEY=clear saves the literal value instead of deleting
- Treat KEY= or KEY: with empty RHS as an explicit clear instead
  of silently keeping the old value

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: handle clear sentinel and empty RHS in key-value paste

  pasting KEY=clear saves the literal value instead of deleting

  of silently keeping the old value

commit.message:
fix: homepage link hard gate + ReviewGuard postStatus + retry feedback

- content-generator: add homepage link as hard ISSUE (not warning) using
  same regex as publish route — articles with homepage links now caught
  early by quality gate and retried before reaching Publisher
- content-generator: update retry feedback to include explicit LINK FIX
  message when homepage link issue is present
- publisher: add postStatus:'RETRY' to shouldRetry return so ReviewGuard
  choice state does not crash with 'invalid path' error

fix: map metaDescription→metaDesc + fix Prisma Lambda bundling with inputDir paths

- content-generator: normalize metaDescription → metaDesc in return payload
  (Claude outputs metaDescription; Publisher webhook requires metaDesc)
- infra/stack.ts: fix Prisma bundling — use nodeModules + beforeInstall
  to copy schema, afterBundling runs prisma generate via local bin
  (previous approach used __dirname host paths which fail in Docker)
